name: @shop/factories
description: TypeScript mirror of libs/factories (S-T7): typed builders with seeded-RNG defaults + overrides for the core entities. Plain TS/JS, no runtime deps.
comment: No `npm install` is needed to read this package — it has zero dependencies. It compiles once BFF tooling (NestJS/tsc) arrives with the first BFF slice; until then it is checked in as source and kept in lockstep with libs/factories. See README.md.
